title: oxytropis japonica var. japonica
intro: Oxytropis japonica var. japonica, also known as Japanese burnet, is a perennial plant species in the legume family that is native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in digestion. In traditional herbal medicine, Japanese burnet is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
